mapper.select: select renwumingcheng, sum(case when ceshijieguo in ('优') then 1 else 0 end) as 优, sum(case when ceshijieguo in ('良') then 1 else 0 end) as 良, sum(case when ceshijieguo in ('中') then 1 else 0 end) as 中, sum(case when ceshijieguo in ('差') then 1 else 0 end) as 差 from ceshifenxi 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} group by renwumingcheng
